name: PENDING (via FlaDems.com)
subject: re: Special Election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
******Developing: state Senator Frank Artiles resigns over racist attacks.** Friend: Earlier today, racist state Senator Frank Artiles resigned from his seat, setting up a HIGHLY competitive special election.

**Here 's the thing: **Nationwide, we've seen Democrats make BIG gains in ruby-red districts during special elections. If we want to flip this seat, we have to bring that same enthusiasm to this special election.

**[HERE IS WHAT WE NEED: We need to raise another $10,000 into our Special Election Rapid Response Fund before midnight tonight. Can you click here and donate $2 now?](http://act.floridadems. "http://act.floridadems.org/special-election?amount=2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+HERE+IS+WHAT+WE+NEED+We+need+to+raise+an&utm_campaign=em042117_3_BREAKING&source=em042117_3_BREAKING&refcode=em042117_3_BREAKING&recurring=auto")** ****[Donate $2 now](http://act.floridadems. "http://act.floridadems.org/special-election?amount=25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=em042117_3_BREAKING&source=em042117_3_BREAKING&refcode=em042117_3_BREAKING&recurring=auto")**** ****[Donate $50 now](http://act.floridadems. "http://act.floridadems.org/special-election?amount=50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=em042117_3_BREAKING&source=em042117_3_BREAKING&refcode=em042117_3_BREAKING&recurring=auto")**** ****[Donate $100 now](http://act.floridadems. "http://act.floridadems.org/special-election?amount=100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=em042117_3_BREAKING&source=em042117_3_BREAKING&refcode=em042117_3_BREAKING&recurring=auto")**** ****** **********[OTHER AMOUNT](http://act.floridadems. "http://act.floridadems.org/special-election?amount=25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=6+-+OTHER+AMOUNT&utm_campaign=em042117_3_BREAKING&source=em042117_3_BREAKING&refcode=em042117_3_BREAKING&recurring=auto")**** This race will be the first major election that Floridians face since November's disastrous results.

If we're able to deliver a big win and take this seat back, it will send a crystal clear message that Floridians aren't going to stand for Donald Trump and Frank Artiles's extreme, racist right-wing agenda.

**Chip in now:[http://act.floridadems.org/special-election](http://act.floridadems. "http://act.floridadems.org/special-election?amount=25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=7+-+httpactfloridademsorgspecialelection&utm_campaign=em042117_3_BREAKING&source=em042117_3_BREAKING&refcode=em042117_3_BREAKING&recurring=auto")**

Thanks for all you do,

FlaDems.com

name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily: Weekend Edition
body:
Everything White House for your weekend. |

**WEEKEND EDITION**

President Donald J. Trump's Weekly Address to the Nation
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=341bba447187e40924eb43e000452013636393fe4946c8fb19480acf0402577f4f4c942ef0527e8fcadcefb43955f453994838a7684f513b)

**THIS WEEK'S TOP STORIES**
Presidential Executive Order on Buy American and Hire American.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=341bba447187e40908f3253e8b120ed4acb9302c47718925305d8f6c6c5584337428e8dd19c4370e46a336e030f377d7bf68852480c62544)
President Trump signs S. 544, The Veterans Choice Program Extension and Improvement Act.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=341bba447187e4098280e891dc5018d7e967ccba6104228d3cbf81827a515fe85b5bfc43354496ed4caf1e92a57d0513db98044dc2d7e2e9)
Vice President Pence thanks sailors aboard U.S.S. Ronald Reagan.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=341bba447187e409a173b092ca5ab53f149eaed0de5271f5de1fb82209e02b941ca457f914ae03beae4b650f2653bc8da525c53eb6d9f1f1)

**IN CASE YOU MISSED IT**
POTUS to Call Space to Congratulate Record Breaking Astronaut Peggy Whitson.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=341bba447187e409ca15432e2c45e8bb0938f33dc7091d7ecb555f86a36ecd3dce4420a97074a501399bffbfd01c03d8bb729a5f73f0a78b)
President Trump: Buy American, Hire American.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=341bba447187e409a65c8b2f0721c1c7705e5b0653e4f323a4fad70795959a4022c091f3b71062ee9d5f804e1bd8dd73717559575fbe8949)
President Trump Welcomes the New England Patriots to the White House.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=341bba447187e4096b7ee74139af5254f1145596c0e3f5d5c677ccafb6dc67e07c210036f7511286c8387bb3372c86fd597baf56b492da4e)

**NEWS FROM VICE PRESIDENT PENCE'S ASIA-PACIFIC TOUR**
Vice President Pence arrives in Indonesia.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=341bba447187e40952a21a8f7419438c2cb7492dc8f3165181cafcd988404836117038dd49ef0d91eb60e640e0435cf0a4e04470e40e8147)

**UPCOMING EVENTS**
**THIS WEEKEND: April 22nd & 23rd:** The White House grounds open for 2017 Spring Garden Tours
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=341bba447187e409956c80cf5d93ee21c7ea494c7d9df0e680f8321c73ad16e3b8a9bab34f7da259a3650d81f13f9b03949fd2986cf9c95a)
**April 24th:** President Trump calls space to congratulate record breaking astronaut Peggy Whitson
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=341bba447187e409ca15432e2c45e8bb0938f33dc7091d7ecb555f86a36ecd3dce4420a97074a501399bffbfd01c03d8bb729a5f73f0a78b)

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=341bba447187e4093753e11b19436b228f50a0252a44f0ed842171d425d19e430b7ad28e7b3bf897c2e6ab231e5e7b98d4561bab2e8cd347) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=341bba447187e40936d5a59bf1cd6f9fb1ebe6f5806147684ab6ceed7425c82465e20c1d284a940a678772e627105456fe9433e4c89fa9c3)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4f464e90354a984d31a2f79c18ef856f218edba30166bcfd7e65bb2a08dc4e32e819962bb2723dd31f96fdc369c6aa6ea)

Trump's Weekly Address to the Nation THIS WEEK'S TOP STORIES Presidential Executive Order on Buy American and Hire American. President Trump signs S. 544, The Veterans Choice Program Extension and Improvement Act. Vice President Pence thanks sailors aboard U.S.S. Ronald Reagan. IN CASE YOU MISSED IT POTUS to Call Space to Congratulate Record Breaking Astronaut Peggy Whitson. President Trump: Buy American, Hire American. President Trump Welcomes the New England Patriots to the White House. NEWS FROM VICE PRESIDENT PENCE'S ASIA-PACIFIC TOUR Vice President Pence arrives in Indonesia. name: DNC War Room
subject: Add your name if you believe in science
body:
Join us in our fight to save the planet **This Earth Day, add your name to stand with Democrats and protect the environment.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-the-Environment1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170422_dnc_nd&source=em_20170422_dnc_nd")**

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c84a/4067b0a/2f657c4e1/7e75f74f/3630613356/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170422_dnc_nd&source=em_20170422_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c84a/4067b0a/2f657c4e1/7e75f74c/3630613356/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170422_dnc_nd&source=em_20170422_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c84a/4067b0a/2f657c4e1/7e75f74d/3630613356/VEsB/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170422_dnc_nd&source=em_20170422_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c84a/4067b0a/2f657c4e1/7e75f74a/3630613356/VEsO/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170422_dnc_nd&source=em_20170422_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: Sen. Mazie Hirono (via DSCC.org)
subject: A fight worth fighting (Sessions)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
As a senator representing Hawaii, a state that stands for diversity and inclusion, I am determined to fight this administration's prejudicial words and actions.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1ad/2b07114c/5fc0b531/736c5ac5/2865166814/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/denounce-sessions?source=DPE-20170422-Hirono-ProsHV")
Friend --

Jeff Sessions, the attorney general of the United States, appears to need a reminder: Hawaii was granted statehood in 1959.

I'm happy to tell him where I was when Hawaii became a state. I was in sixth grade at Koko Head Elementary School in Honolulu, and was chosen to pin the 50th star on the American flag in front of my teachers and classmates at a special assembly to celebrate statehood.

And like my fellow citizens in Hawaii, I am a proud American.

But when Sessions was discussing Donald Trump's executive order that banned travelers from several Muslim-majority countries -- an order blocked by Hawaii judge Derrick Watson -- Sessions told an interviewer:

_"I really am amazed that a judge sitting on an island in the Pacific can issue an order that stops the President of the United States"_

**I expect the top law enforcement officer to remember Hawaii residents are Americans, and to understand the independent role of the judiciary.

[Will you join me in denouncing Jeff Sessions' biased and prejudiced attack on our independent judiciary, a Hawaii judge, and in effect, Hawaii's history, culture, and values? Add your name >>](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1ad/2b07114c/5fc0b531/736c5ac5/2865166814/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/denounce-sessions?source=DPE-20170422-Hirono-ProsHV")**

In spite of the Justice Department's attempt to walk back the attorney general's comments, his words reflect this administration's discriminatory attitude. In Trump and Sessions' vision of America, diversity is a weakness, not a strength. Hawaii is a living reminder that they are dead wrong.

While outrageous comments from the President and members of his administration are all too common, I expect the Attorney General to remember that all federal judges are confirmed by the US Senate.

And Judge Watson was indeed unanimously confirmed by the Senate -- _including by Sessions_ , then a senator.

As a senator representing Hawaii, a state that stands for diversity and inclusion, I am determined to fight this administration's prejudicial words and actions. We must stand up for our independent judiciary and the important role it plays in defending our democracy.

The Trump Administration's outrageous rhetoric cannot be the accepted norm. When this administration resorts to alternative facts or makes comments that compound division in our country rather than bring us together, we must challenge it.

**Add your name to denounce Sessions ' unacceptable and prejudicial rhetoric:**

[**http://dscc.org/denounce-sessions**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1ad/2b07114c/5fc0b531/736c5ac5/2865166814/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/denounce-sessions?source=DPE-20170422-Hirono-ProsHV")

There are fights worth fighting. This is one of them.

Thank you,

Senator Mazie Hirono

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1ad/2b07114c/5fc0b531/736c5ac4/2865166814/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1ad/2b07114c/5fc0b531/736c5ac7/2865166814/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1ad/2b07114c/5fc0b531/736c5ac6/2865166814/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

clean_body: As a senator representing Hawaii, a state that stands for diversity and inclusion, I am determined to fight this administration's prejudicial words and actions. "" Friend -- Jeff Sessions, the attorney general of the United States, appears to need a reminder: Hawaii was granted statehood in 1959. I'm happy to tell him where I was when Hawaii became a state. I was in sixth grade at Koko Head Elementary School in Honolulu, and was chosen to pin the 50th star on the American flag in front of my teachers and classmates at a special assembly to celebrate statehood. And like my fellow citizens in Hawaii, I am a proud American. But when Sessions was discussing Donald Trump's executive order that banned travelers from several Muslim-majority countries -- an order blocked by Hawaii judge Derrick Watson -- Sessions told an interviewer: "I really am amazed that a judge sitting on an island in the Pacific can issue an order that stops the President of the United States" I expect the top law enforcement officer to remember Hawaii residents are Americans, and to understand the independent role of the judiciary. "" In spite of the Justice Department's attempt to walk back the attorney general's comments, his words reflect this administration's discriminatory attitude. In Trump and Sessions' vision of America, diversity is a weakness, not a strength. Hawaii is a living reminder that they are dead wrong. While outrageous comments from the President and members of his administration are all too common, I expect the Attorney General to remember that all federal judges are confirmed by the US Senate. And Judge Watson was indeed unanimously confirmed by the Senate -- including by Sessions , then a senator. As a senator representing Hawaii, a state that stands for diversity and inclusion, I am determined to fight this administration's prejudicial words and actions. We must stand up for our independent judiciary and the important role it plays in defending our democracy. The Trump Administration's outrageous rhetoric cannot be the accepted norm. When this administration resorts to alternative facts or makes comments that compound division in our country rather than bring us together, we must challenge it. name: Team Maggie
subject: IMPORTANT: Help elect Jon Ossoff >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd77/2a380d31/15822e25/fefa03/2159212034/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd77/2a380d31/15822e25/fefa03/2159212034/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Did you know that Georgia's sixth congressional district has been red for _38 years_?
**But now, for the first time in nearly four decades, we have a real chance to flip this seat to Democratic control. We can elect Jon Ossoff.**
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd77/2a380d31/15822e25/fefa0c/2159212034/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQyMl9Pc3NvZmZSdW5PZmYyX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170422_OssoffRunOff2_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Jon is committed to standing with Planned Parenthood, ensuring that the minimum wage is a livable wage, and protecting our national security and destroying ISIS.
But with 38 years of conservative tradition working against him and Trump talking about heading to Georgia to campaign for his opponent, Jon needs all of the help we can muster:
[**Please, donate $3 or more -- every dollar you can spare -- to help elect Jon Ossoff and score a critically important victory for Democrats.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd77/2a380d31/15822e25/fefa0c/2159212034/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQyMl9Pc3NvZmZSdW5PZmYyX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170422_OssoffRunOff2_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Jon Ossoff and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd77/2a380d31/15822e25/fefa0d/2159212034/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQyMl9Pc3NvZmZSdW5PZmYyX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiMyJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170422_OssoffRunOff2_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd77/2a380d31/15822e25/fefa0e/2159212034/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQyMl9Pc3NvZmZSdW5PZmYyX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170422_OssoffRunOff2_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd77/2a380d31/15822e25/fefa0f/2159212034/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQyMl9Pc3NvZmZSdW5PZmYyX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVF5QjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170422_OssoffRunOff2_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd77/2a380d31/15822e25/fefa0c/2159212034/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQyMl9Pc3NvZmZSdW5PZmYyX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170422_OssoffRunOff2_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Republicans are fighting tooth and nail to keep this seat, and Trump himself is invested in ensuring that one of his supporters wins.
But Jon's a fighter, team, and he shattered expectations in his primary earlier this week. With his commitment to protecting access to health care and reproductive rights, he is exactly the person Georgia needs in Congress.
[**Everything is on the line here, team, and we really can't afford for Jon to lose. Please, donate $3 or more now. Anything you can give makes a difference.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd77/2a380d31/15822e25/fefa0c/2159212034/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQyMl9Pc3NvZmZSdW5PZmYyX2FsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170422_OssoffRunOff2_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Thanks for being part of the fight,
Team Maggie
